use tracing::{info, span, Level, Span};

fn process_batch(records: &[Record]) {
    // GOOD: batch-level span, let tracing handle per-record details lazily
    let batch_span = span!(Level::INFO, "batch", count = records.len());
    let _enter = batch_span.enter();

    for record in records {
        // fields evaluated only if subscriber enables this span
        tracing::debug!(id = record.id, name = %record.name, "processing record");
    }
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
